tests.description: Simple ASCII baseline - NFC normalization applied but no effect on ASCII input
NFC normalization of surrounding text with combining diacritical marks does not affect ASCII drug matching
Precomposed é (U+00E9) in surrounding text - NFC input, ASCII drug still matches
Decomposed é (U+0065 U+0301) in surrounding text - NFC normalizes it, ASCII drug still matches
Non-ASCII diacritical characters in surrounding text do not affect ASCII drug matching
Emoji in surrounding text does not affect ASCII drug matching
